# PinIt

> PinIt is a free, lightweight, open-source (Apache-2.0) Always on Top utility for Windows 10 and 11. It pins any window to stay on top via the global hotkey Win+Ctrl+T and supports true per-window opacity (Win+Ctrl+= / Win+Ctrl+-). Pinned windows and their opacity are remembered and re-pinned after a restart.

## Key facts

- Platform: Windows 10 and Windows 11 only
- Price: free and open source (Apache-2.0)
- Pin/unpin hotkey: Win+Ctrl+T (customizable)
- Opacity hotkeys: Win+Ctrl+= (more opaque), Win+Ctrl+- (more transparent), range 20-100%
- Show/hide the PinIt panel: Win+Ctrl+P
- Installer size: about 2.5 MB (NSIS) / 3.8 MB (MSI)
- Tech: Rust backend using the Win32 API directly, Tauri v2, React frontend
- Pins persist across restarts (saved to %LOCALAPPDATA%/PinIt)
- Re-enforces the topmost flag on Windows 11, where the DWM compositor can strip it

## How to keep a window always on top in Windows 11 or 10

1. Download and install PinIt: https://github.com/Razee4315/Pin-It/releases/latest
2. Click the window you want to keep visible, then press Win+Ctrl+T.
3. Optional: press Win+Ctrl+- to make the window see-through.

## Compared to alternatives

- Microsoft PowerToys "Always On Top": free, but its opacity setting only tints the highlight border (not true window transparency) and pins are forgotten on restart. PinIt does both.
- DeskPins: free but last released in 2018; no opacity control, no persistence.
- WindowTop: has opacity but is commercial/freemium.

## Links

- Website: https://razee4315.github.io/Pin-It/
- Source code: https://github.com/Razee4315/Pin-It
- Download: https://github.com/Razee4315/Pin-It/releases/latest
- Author: Saqlain Abbas (https://github.com/Razee4315)
